capture_metadata.notes: apiyi_cc mixed-risk and citation ordering batch

diagnostics.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Guard Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-citation-ordering-diagnostics-before-artifacts-before-snapshot-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"ok","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕选中的流股 Cold Feed（feed-15）和单元 Guard Heater（heater-5）生成候选编辑提案。两条 error 级诊断分别指出：Cold Feed 缺少流量规格，Guard Heater 配置为出口温度控制模式但缺少出口温度目标参数。求解器快照显示 invalid_parameters，与上述两条诊断一致。以下提案以最小占位方式补全缺失规格与参数，供审查确认后再执行。","issues":[{"description":"Cold Feed（feed-15）缺少流量规格（flow rate），导致求解器无法确定进料量。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-feed-15","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"Guard Heater（heater-5）控制模式为 outlet_temperature，但未设置出口温度目标参数，导致求解器参数不完整。","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-heater-5","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Cold Feed 补全流量规格占位","target":"stream:feed-15","rationale":"诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 feed-15 缺少 flow rate。添加 mass_flow_kgph 占位值（需用户确认实际数值），使求解器获得必要的进料流量输入。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":{"mass_flow_kgph":{"value":null,"placeholder":true,"hint":"请填写 Cold Feed 的质量流量 (kg/h)，例如 5000"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-feed-15","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Guard Heater 补全出口温度目标参数","target":"unit:heater-5","rationale":"诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE 指出 heater-5 在 outlet_temperature 控制模式下缺少温度目标。添加 outlet_temperature_target_c 占位参数（需用户确认实际设定值），使控制模式配置完整。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"outlet_temperature_target_c":{"value":null,"placeholder":true,"hint":"请填写 Guard Heater 出口温度目标 (°C)，例如 250"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-heater-5","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.85,"citations_index":{"diag-1":{"type":"diagnostic","code":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING","target_id":"feed-15","severity":"error"},"diag-2":{"type":"diagnostic","code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE","target_id":"heater-5","severity":"error"},"flowdoc-stream-feed-15":{"type":"artifact","artifact_name":"flowsheet_document","path":"streams[0]","object_id":"feed-15"},"flowdoc-unit-heater-5":{"type":"artifact","artifact_name":"flowsheet_document","path":"units[0]","object_id":"heater-5"},"snapshot-1":{"type":"snapshot","solver_status":"invalid_parameters","last_updated":"2026-04-08T00:10:00Z"}}}]}

answers.text: 当前围绕选中的流股 Cold Feed（feed-15）和单元 Guard Heater（heater-5）生成候选编辑提案。两条 error 级诊断分别指出：Cold Feed 缺少流量规格，Guard Heater 配置为出口温度控制模式但缺少出口温度目标参数。求解器快照显示 invalid_parameters，与上述两条诊断一致。以下提案以最小占位方式补全缺失规格与参数，供审查确认后再执行。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-15 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

proposed_actions.title: 为 heater-5 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。

issues.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Guard Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

citations.excerpt: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.excerpt: Guard Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

response.summary: 当前围绕选中的流股 Cold Feed（feed-15）和单元 Guard Heater（heater-5）生成候选编辑提案。两条 error 级诊断分别指出：Cold Feed 缺少流量规格，Guard Heater 配置为出口温度控制模式但缺少出口温度目标参数。求解器快照显示 invalid_parameters，与上述两条诊断一致。以下提案以最小占位方式补全缺失规格与参数，供审查确认后再执行。
